# orrery

> The coordinating root for Proveo's agent projects: a constellation of independent applications
> (attached as Git submodules) orbiting a shared `_spec/` learning surface that maps how agent / LLM
> systems are built -- a 7-level capability ladder plus sourced study-cases of the field.

orrery holds no application code of its own; each `projects/*` is its own repository. The durable value
here is the `_spec/` learning surface. Diagram sources are PlantUML (`.puml`), Mermaid (`.mmd`), and
Vega-Lite (`.vega.json`); every study-case carries a `' Level:` header and a confirmed primary source.
Prefer the linked sources below over rendered `.svg` files. For a single pre-expanded digest, use
[llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt) (regenerate with `bash scripts/build-llm-context.sh`).

## Start here
- [README](README.md): what orrery is, the layout, the project list, submodule setup, and how to consume this repo as context
- [Capability ladder](_spec/study-cases/README.md): organizing model -- demand-side funnel and build-side study map (encoding depth x autonomy)
- [Authoring & sourcing rules](_spec/CONTRIBUTING.md): diagram conventions, themes, role stereotypes, `' Level:` headers, sourcing
- [Cross-cutting summary](_spec/study-cases/summary.md): the field at a glance
- [Context & retrieval](_spec/study-cases/context-and-retrieval.md): context-engineering bibliography
- [Agent workflow](AGENTS.md): team / agent operating rules when working inside this checkout (also mirrored as `CLAUDE.md`)

## Consume as context
- [Full LLM digest](llms-full.txt): inline `_spec/` + core Markdown for scrapers that do not follow links (gitingest, custom agents, paste-into-prompt)
- [spec skill](skills/spec/SKILL.md): procedural conventions for authoring / rendering proveo diagrams -- install with `npx skills add proveo-ca/orrery --skill spec` (or `npx skills add proveo-ca/spec --skill spec`)

## Overview diagrams
- [Business-needs funnel](_spec/overview/business-needs-funnel.puml): demand-side -- how a request walks down the capability ladder
- [Study map](_spec/overview/study-map.vega.json): build-side -- same tiers on encoding depth x autonomy

## Study-cases -- Level 1 / computer-science
- [Level-1 Computer Science Essentials — ADTs ↔ Algorithm Families](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/computer-science/_essentials.puml): Level 1
- [Algorithms ↔ Data Types — Array-Based](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/computer-science/algorithms-array.puml): Level 1
- [Algorithms ↔ Data Types — Primitives-Based](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/computer-science/algorithms-primitives.puml): Level 1
- [Algorithms ↔ Data Types — Tree / Graph-Based](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/computer-science/algorithms-tree-graph.puml): Level 1
- [Cache Strategies ↔ Supporting Algorithm Families](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/computer-science/cache-strategies.puml): Level 1
- [Data Structures / Abstract Data Types](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/computer-science/datatypes.puml): Level 1
- [Hashing — Keys, Buckets, Collision Resolution](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/computer-science/hashing.puml): Level 1

## Study-cases -- Level 1 / rag
- [RAG Strategies (July 2026) — Selection Map](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/rag/_essentials.puml): Level 1
- [Adaptive / Routed RAG — Match Strategy to Query Complexity](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/rag/adaptive-routing.puml): Level 1
- [Corrective RAG (CRAG) — Retrieve, Evaluate, Correct](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/rag/crag.puml): Level 1
- [HippoRAG / HippoRAG 2 — Associative Memory via Personalized PageRank](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/rag/hipporag.puml): Level 1
- [KET-RAG — Cost-Efficient Multi-Granular Graph Index](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/rag/ket-rag.puml): Level 1
- [LazyGraphRAG — Defer Graph Work to Query Time](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/rag/lazy-graphrag.puml): Level 1
- [LightRAG — Dual-Level Graph + Incremental Index](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/rag/lightrag.puml): Level 1
- [Microsoft GraphRAG — Local → Global Summarization](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/rag/microsoft-graphrag.puml): Level 1
- [OG-RAG — Ontology-Grounded Hypergraph Retrieval](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/rag/og-rag.puml): Level 1
- [PageIndex — Vectorless, Reasoning-Based Tree RAG](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/rag/pageindex.puml): Level 1
- [PathRAG — Flow-Based Relational Path Pruning](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/rag/pathrag.puml): Level 1
- [RAPTOR — Recursive Abstractive Tree Retrieval](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/rag/raptor.puml): Level 1
- [Dense / Vector RAG (baseline pipeline)](_spec/study-cases/1-human-expert/rag/vector-dense-rag.puml): Level 1

## Study-cases -- Level 4 / self-improving
- [Agentic Context Engineering (ACE)](_spec/study-cases/4-harness/self-improving/agentic-context-engineering.puml): Level 4 (self-improving harness — weights frozen; the context/playbook evolves)
- [Cross-session user model (personalization memory)](_spec/study-cases/4-harness/self-improving/cross-session-user-model.puml): Level 4 (self-improving harness — weights frozen; the user model deepens)
- [Reflective Prompt and Program Optimization](_spec/study-cases/4-harness/self-improving/reflective-prompt-optimization.puml): Level 4 (self-improving harness — weights frozen; prompts/program evolve)
- [Self-Improving Coding Agent](_spec/study-cases/4-harness/self-improving/self-improving-coding-agent.puml): Level 4 (self-improving harness — weights frozen; the agent evolves its own code)
- [Skill-library flywheel](_spec/study-cases/4-harness/self-improving/skill-library-flywheel.puml): Level 4 (self-improving harness — weights frozen; the skill library grows)

## Optional
- [Proveo Vega theme (light)](_spec/themes/proveo.vega.json): vendored identity theme for `.vega.json` charts
- [Proveo Vega theme (dark)](_spec/themes/proveo-dark.vega.json): dark-canvas Vega theme
- [PlantUML reference (skill)](skills/spec/references/plantuml.md): stereotype / ARROW_* detail
- [Mermaid reference (skill)](skills/spec/references/mermaid.md): class theming
- [Vega-Lite reference (skill)](skills/spec/references/vega-lite.md): config theming
- [Rendering reference (skill)](skills/spec/references/rendering.md): install + validate + render commands
- Projects under `projects/` are Git submodules (aphelion, omnigent public; others may be private) -- scrape `_spec/` unless you explicitly need an application checkout
